role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Strictly analyzed Hangul script and romanization ('-gil') on signs.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation types, and settlement density.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific species (Pinus densiflora, Cycas revoluta) and landscaping styles.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road signs, markings, and utility pole safety standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain evidence (tractor brand, pole design) to distinguish countries.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided concrete evidence grounded in the image, and correctly identified South Korea through multiple independent lines of evidence (linguistic, regulatory, and meta).

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Hangul characters and '-gil' suffix clearly visible on signs.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Rural agricultural setting and vegetation match description.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Pine trees and white flowering shrubs are visible.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Blue street sign and yellow/black pole stripes are clearly visible.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: LS Tractor branding and pole design are accurate.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly identified South Korea as the final answer.
